# themes/ — synthesis docs

Empty for now, on purpose. A theme lives as a `theme/*` tag on notes until enough notes
share it to be worth pulling together. At that point, write a synthesis doc here named
after the theme (`context-economy.md`) that gathers the thread, links its notes with
`[[wikilinks]]`, and states what we actually believe.

Candidate themes accumulating in note tags so far: `context-economy`, `data-access`,
`portability`. Promote when ready — not before.
